title: What I think about government shutdown request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request about the government shutdown, arguing it is Donald Trump's fault rather than the Democrats', characterizing Trump as a power-hungry rule-breaker akin to a tyrant. He recommends voting for Democrats, specifically mentioning Bernie Sanders and AOC, as the fix.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: abuse of emergency powers; sign of someone trying to become a king
a tyrant and ruthless rule-breaker who doesn't respect limits of presidential power
should be voted out; complicit in Trump's behavior
vote for Democrats, especially new ones like AOC who aren't PAC-funded
bad nominee who was pushed through anyway
Trump lied about it being publicly viewable

transcript.text: Hello, I'm going to do a request video about the government shutdown that I got today by Marty McFly, and this will be the first video that I ever uploaded to my YouTube channel, my normal YouTube channel, not my vlog channel, on my cell phone here, so that's chill.

So, yeah, I think the government shutdown is a whole bunch of douchebag faggery, because it puts all of the government people out of work, which makes it so they can't make the money to pay the mortgage and buy the food and stuff.

So, now that that's out of the way, that we know that government shutdown is bad, like, shouldn't we turn the government back on because, you know, unlike a natural catastrophe, you can actually control government shutdowns because you can turn the government back on because the government is a thing that's controlled by people.
And so, we should take advantage of that.
And so, the next step would be to identify which people are the ones in charge of and who are at fault of the government shutdown.
So, I saw, I think I saw, like, an interview with Donald Trump, our president, talking to, maybe it was Judge Jude Neen interview, because that was during the government shutdown or something.
And he goes, yeah, it's the dang Democrats who are doing government shutdown because they don't want the wall.
And so, those poor, you know, Americans, but those Americans who are suffering are good Americans and they understand a government shutdown is necessary.
So, I think he was saying that he thinks that the government, that he said it was the Democrats' fault because they didn't want the wall.
But, I would postulate that it is Donald Trump's fault.
He's the one who is declaring this national emergency.
You know what else he said?
He said he's going to do a national emergency because of the wall.
And so, that's going to make it so that he can get extra funding ready for the wall and get the wall built and all that stuff.
So, I would say that Donald Trump is the kind of person, is the guy who does whatever it takes to win.
Kind of like in his book.
I've heard him say stuff like that on Apprentice.
I used to watch The Apprentice, okay?
I was a big, big fan of The Apprentice.
I think it was, like, on, it was on in Chile and I watched it in Chile or something like that.
But, yeah, like season one and stuff.
But, yeah, he's just, like, ruthless businessman guy.
And so, it's, the government shutdown is the fault of Donald Trump, okay?
It's not the fault of the other ones, of the Democrats.
All the way until Donald Trump came, people did politics in a, like, consensus way, a voting on stuff, following the rules, respecting the limits of your power of your office,
Understanding the three branches of government and why we do that, and limits of power, and Donald Trump has never, you know, demonstrated he understands that.
So, he's just doing this, uh, uh, kind of like a, yeah, like a, uh, like a kid doing breaking rules and, you know, having tender tantrum, tender tantrum, doing whatever it takes to win.
So, he, uh, yeah, they shut the government shutdown.
And they've done it before, so it's not just the government, it's not just Donald Trump, it's the Republicans and anybody who supports Donald Trump.
But Donald Trump's the worst, so that's why he's had the longest government shutdown.
Um, so what we need to do is, in order to fix government shutdown, is we need to, uh, realize, everybody needs to realize what Donald Trump is.
He's not a Democrat, he's a, he's a tyrant.

Um, and he, you know, a, uh, a national emergency is supposed to be for an emergency, you know, like, uh, like some kind of a natural catastrophe or something like that, or an army or war, you know, not, not because all,
All of a sudden a bunch of racists freak out and go, oh my God, we, what did, what did we elect?
What did they elect?
Brown people?
Oh no, too many brown people, a catastrophe, uh, emergency.
So extra.

Um, you're pointing him, he's a bad guy and then they just push him through anyway.
So, yeah, so get, so what, in order to fix government shutdown, we need to kick Trumpy out.
Okay.
